trades.sentiment_summary: Omnicom's exchange offer for IPG senior notes expired with strong 93.7% participation ($2.76 billion tendered), leaving only $185 million outstanding, with settlement expected on December 2, 2025, as part of the completed IPG acquisition.[3] IPG is being removed from the S&P 500 index, replaced by Sandisk, due to the Omnicom merger effective November 28, 2025.[4] Stock price data shows IPG trading around $24-25 with recent positive weekly and monthly returns amid broader market highs.[2]
